title: Star Wars (2015) 38
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 38}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 38}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Starwars2015-38-final.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 38 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]]{{SW|url=news/marvels-star-wars-series-gets-new-creative-team|text=Marvel's ''Star Wars'' Series Gets New Creative Team}} |penciller=[[Salvador Larroca]] |inker=Salvador Larroca |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/60821/star_wars_2015_38|text=Star Wars (2015) #38}} |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=*[[David Marquez]] *[[Matthew Wilson]] |editor=*[[Jordan D. White]] *[[Heather Antos]] {{C|Assistant editor}} |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[November 8]], [[2017]] |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[1 ABY]]{{HelmetCollectionCite|77|Highlights of the Saga}} |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=38 }} '''''Star Wars'' 38''' is the thirty-eighth issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]] and illustrated by [[Salvador Larroca]]. It was released on [[November 8]], [[2017]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''THE ASHES OF JEDHA!'' ''KIERON GILLEN'S FIRST ISSUE ON STAR WARS!'' ''The Rebel Alliance turns its attention to the shattered planet of Jedha! Once the site of great significance to the Jedi, Jedha was left in ruins when the Death Star annihilated the Holy City there. Now, new series writer Kieron Gillen joins artist Salvador Larroca to bring Luke, Leia, Han, and the rest to the remains of the tragic victim of the Empire's fury! ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Part I
THE ASHES OF JEDHA |text=It is period of high tension in the galaxy. Rebellion leaders Princess Leia and Luke Skywalker, joined by smugglers Han Solo and Sana Starros, are leading the mission to find a new base of operations. Meanwhile, the Galactic Empire has returned to Jedha in an attempt to collect the remaining kyber crystals that survived the Death Star's attack... }} ==Plot summary== ===Attack on Jedha=== On the snowy, dusty plains of [[Jedha]], a rebel fighter ducked behind his fallen [[snowspeeder]]. Imperial forces were closing in. He and his companions, [[Ubin Des]] and [[Chulco Gi]], were running out of time. Suddenly, a Jedi on a dark steed appeared, his blue lightsaber ignited. The Jedi announced he was looking for [[Saw Gerrera]]'s [[Partisans]]. Chulco, relieved, told the Jedi he had found them. The Jedi called out to Han Solo aboard the ''[[Millennium Falcon]]'', telling him to prepare for a quick escape. The rebels scrambled aboard, just barely making it off the planet. ===A new destination=== The Falcon flew to [[NaJedha]], a world of beautiful pink and purple crystals. As they approached, one of the rebels, Luke, noticed a nearby planet with a massive chunk missing. The broken planet rained rocks down onto NaJedha's surface. Chulco introduced himself to the Jedi as an aspirant to the [[Disciples of the Whills]]. He explained that he had been in the middle of a sacred meditation that required a month-long stay in the temple, which the Empire had since destroyed. He said the planet was dying and that the Force was sickened here. Despite the devastation, Chulco maintained his faith that everything happened for a reason. Leia stepped forward to introduce herself, but Ubin already knew her name. Ubin revealed she had been a part of the Rebel Alliance until recently. She was at [[Yavin]] and would have been at the [[Battle of Scarif]] if she hadn't been in the sickbay. After the devastation of Jedha, she returned home and joined the reformed Partisans. Ubin stated that the Empire had almost completely destroyed Jedha and now came back to sift through its remains, an act she described as offensive as "corpse robbing." Leia explained that the rebels must be united, but Ubin said the Partisans weren't interested in joining the Alliance. They fight their own war, she stated, now more than ever. Saw Gerrera may be gone, she said, but they operate in his shadow. Leia countered that they were all under the shadow of the Empire now. ===The Empire's new mission=== Aboard a [[Star Destroyer]], a technician informed Commander Befa that Commander Kanchar was arriving for an inspection. Moments later, Kanchar arrived with Queen Trios of Shu-Torun. She introduced herself and offered her experience in mineral extraction to the Empire. The commander insisted on her help, stating that Jedha was a rich source of kyber crystals but that the shipments had stopped. An officer then showed a small crate of the precious crystals. When Befa asked where the rest were, he was told that was all there was. Kanchar then announced he was taking command of the Star Destroyer and that Befa would be redeployed to a requisition post. When Befa asked where, Kanchar killed him. Queen Trios commented that after being threatened by Darth Vader, everything else seemed "a little underwhelming." Kanchar stated that they must retrieve the kyber crystals and destroy the rebels to finish what Grand Moff Tarkin started. The ''Millennium Falcon'' later landed on Jedha, this time piloted by Ubin and Chulco. They were immediately captured by partisan soldiers and brought before [[Benthic|Benthic "Two Tubes."]] ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 38}} ===Cover gallery===
